objections.objection: You got the problem right. But I need to bring this to finance — how do you help me make that case?
This sounds like every other vendor pitch. What's concretely different — not in words, but in the mechanism?

transcript.text: Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.
You got the problem right. But I need to bring this to finance — how do you help me make that case?
From your current setup, what is creating the most manual work right now?
This sounds like every other vendor pitch. What's concretely different — not in words, but in the mechanism?
undefined What would take the most pain off your team specifically?
Ok. Send me something I can bring to finance without a long internal pitch.

Mellow's scope specifically: KYC, contractor documentation, payment chain, and audit trail on every transaction — on our side. What we don't take on: misclassification risk and strategic legal decisions — those stay with you. That's the line, without blurring it.
Waiting for the materials. When will you send them?
